name: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.
h1: Advanced Micro Devices's GCC footprint in India
lede: Advanced Micro Devices runs four capability centers across three Indian cities. Bengaluru, Mumbai and Hyderabad, covering engineering & design, R&D and sales & marketing, built over 22 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Advanced Micro Devices office in India. We map four, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Advanced Micro Devices GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Advanced Micro Devices runs 4 verified GCC centers across 3 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Mumbai, Hyderabad), covering engineering & design, R&D and sales & marketing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership

titles.title: Country Head - GCC & Value Business, Alliances
Senior Manager- Networks & IT Head - India

about.description: Advanced Micro Devices's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Mumbai and Hyderabad, spanning engineering & design, R&D and sales & marketing. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 100 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Advanced Micro Devices operate in India?
faq.a: Advanced Micro Devices operates 4 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Advanced Micro Devices have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Advanced Micro Devices's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru, Mumbai and Hyderabad.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Advanced Micro Devices run in India?
faq.a: Advanced Micro Devices runs engineering & design, R&D and sales & marketing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Advanced Micro Devices's India GCCs?
faq.a: Advanced Micro Devices's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Advanced Micro Devices's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 100 leaders at Advanced Micro Devices's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
